message:
fix(render): apply style-merging fix to remaining apply_style copies

The style-merging fix (bd58693) updated apply_style in lib.rs and
forms.rs but missed three other copies of the same function:

- ftui-runtime/src/string_model.rs
- ftui-extras/src/filepicker.rs
- ftui-extras/src/traceback.rs

All three had the same two bugs:
1. bg replacement without alpha compositing (breaks semi-transparent overlays)
2. with_flags replacing attrs instead of merged_flags OR-merging them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
